text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One afternoon, while I'm relaxing in my office...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer. We'd really like to get your
advice on something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh do say yes! Pretty please! Come on, "yes" on
three! One, two—
choice_data_list: Sure. What do you want advice on?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You see, we're going to be interviewed tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: They plan to have a photo shoot, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru told me that if I have my picture
taken, my soul will be sucked out of my body.
Apparently, I need to "avoid it at all costs."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And that's the truth! They get you with that shutter, and click! Your soul's jumping straight out of ya! All that's left is a shell!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Though I do think Suzuka'll end up fine, seeing
how fast she is. But I'm afraid they'll catch me
straight away!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I think... that's just a superstition.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Watch it! This is just like baking bread—let your
guard down for one minute and you're toast!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What are you gonna do if we drop our guards and
get our souls vacuumed right out? Just thinking
about it is giving me the heebie-jeebies...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Any ideas, Trainer? How do we deal with those
huge cameras reporters are always lugging
around?!
choice_data_list:
Modern cameras don't take your soul, so you'll
be fine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Modern cameras? You mean they're safer than
the older ones?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Matikanefukukitaru a brief explanation on
how cameras have evolved.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see what you're saying... So these cameras
don't work like those evil daguerreotype ones
made with silver and mercury...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You learn something new every day! You're so
smart, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Guess there's nothing for me to be scared of.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. So Suzuka, allow me to explain. There is
nothing to fear. You see, the thing about modern
cameras—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Erm... I've been right next to you listening this
whole time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru sounds like an expert now. It
looks like she came out of this exchange a little
wiser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What a suggestion! You want us to plot a
soul-salvaging tactic to take back what's
rightfully ours?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh! It's a little risky, but it might just work! I'll
snatch back my soul before that camera even
knows it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If I don't do anything, everyone will end up
soul-sucked, all across the country—sad shells of
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
You're up next, Fukukitaru. Look at the camera
and say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nooo, I got snapped!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Time to strike back before they steal my soul!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hum-dilly-dee, come back to me! Soul retrieval
magic!

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, wh-what was that? Is that some sort of
performance?! It was pretty neat, so shall we get
another shot of it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's desperately rattling off incantations at the
camera. We should probably channel all that
energy she has somewhere else.
